questions.question: Change the direct statement “I am tired” into reported speech: She said {a1}.
Choose the correct reported statement: Tom told me {a1}.
The reporting verb is present. Choose the correct clause: She says {a1}.
Marta said, “My brother is here.” Choose the reported version: Marta said {a1}.
Past reporting verb: “We have finished.” They said {a1}.
Reported speech should avoid quotation marks. Choose {a1}.
Choose the natural reported statement with optional “that”: She said {a1}.
Choose statement word order: He said {a1}.

a1.answer: that the meeting started at nine
options: that the meeting started at nine
that did the meeting start at nine
that started the meeting at nine?
